title: Mentolder-Assistent (help widget redesign)
description:
## Summary

Replaces the static `HelpPanel` + 508-line `helpContent.ts` with a conversational, action-capable Mentolder-Assistent. Mounted in both `/admin/*` and `/portal/*` behind env-flag gates that are now turned ON.

**No LLM is wired** — the user owns that decision (DSGVO, model choice, key handling). Until they wire one in `lib/assistant/llm.ts`, the assistant falls back to deterministic keyword search over the existing 33-section helpContent.

## What ships

- Floating gold "?" icon, bottom-right, in both admin and portal layouts
- Click → chat panel with text input + push-to-talk mic (Whisper STT via `/api/assistant/transcribe`)
- Question → keyword search → returns the best-matching help section formatted as a chat reply
- Proactive nudges (admin: morning briefing, term-imminent, fragebogen submitted, payment received; portal: first-login onboarding, signature pending, 24h/1h reminder, coach message, fragebogen open). All `safeQuery`-wrapped so missing tables warn instead of crash.
- Action whitelist: 4/5 admin actions wired, 3/7 portal actions wired (rest stubbed — see follow-ups in spec)
- Profile isolation enforced server-side (admin actions cannot leak into portal)

## Documents

- Spec: `docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-08-mentolder-assistent-design.md`
- Plan: `docs/superpowers/plans/2026-05-08-mentolder-assistent.md`

## Test plan

- [x] `npx tsc --noEmit` clean
- [x] `npx vitest run src/lib/assistant/` — 27 tests passing, 3 DB-integration tests skipped
- [ ] Live smoke on `web.mentolder.de/admin` after deploy
- [ ] Live smoke on `web.korczewski.de/portal` after deploy
